dataDict.import.file.format.tip: File import for knowledge items only supports Excel (xlsx) and CSV formats.
dataDict.import.file.structure.tip: The first row of the file is the header row, which must be consistent with the knowledge item field configuration. Each subsequent row represents one knowledge item.
dataDict.import.export.usage.tip: You can export all data, modify it, and then import it back.
